arts.ttl: Chelsea set STUNNING Trevoh Chalobah transfer stance
arts.sum: Chelsea could reportedly sell Trevoh Chalobah on a permanent deal before the end of the January transfer window after recalling him from his loan spell at Crystal Palace . Following confirmation of Chalobah’s return to Chelsea on 15 January, Maresca confirmed why the Blues opted to end his loan spell at Crystal Palace early.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca CONFIRMS Chelsea transfer decision
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has insisted that Chelsea don’t need to sign a “killer” centre forward, despite Nicolas Jackson ’s recent woes in front of goal. Jackson has failed to score since Chelsea’s 2-1 win over Brentford on 15 December and although the Senegal international has registered nine goals in 20 league matches so far this campaign, he has been heavily criticised over the past few weeks.
